files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Bun configuration for Flywheel Gateway
+# https://bun.sh/docs/runtime/bunfig
+
+[test]
+# Only scan apps and packages directories for unit tests
+# E2E tests in tests/e2e use Playwright and are run separately via "bunx playwright test"

@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
     "dev:gateway": "bun run --filter @flywheel/gateway dev",
     "dev:web": "bun run --filter @flywheel/web dev",
     "build": "bun run --filter '*' build",
-    "test": "DB_FILE_NAME=:memory: bun test .test.ts",
+    "test": "DB_FILE_NAME=:memory: bun test apps packages .test.ts",
     "test:integration": "DB_FILE_NAME=:memory: bun test tests/integration",
     "test:e2e": "bunx playwright test",
     "e2e:server": "bun scripts/e2e-server.ts",
